title: afzelia virgata
intro: Afzelia virgata, also known as the Forest Mahogany or Winton Mahogany, is a deciduous tree species native to Australia. The medicinal properties of Afzelia virgata are attributed to its bark, leaves, and seeds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Afzelia virgata include reducing inflammation, treating fever, and alleviating digestive problems, among others. The herbal preparations of Afzelia virgata include a decoction of the bark and leaves, which can be made into a tea or used as a paste to treat skin conditions.
